sp_widget.name: ENAMS Feature Cards
sp_widget.template:
How ENAMS Works

Submit your network request in four simple steps.

1

Submit Request

Create a VPN, Firewall, Static IP or Port Activation request.

2

Manager Approval

Your manager reviews and approves the request.

3

Network Team

The Network Engineer completes the assigned task.

4

Completed

Your request is fulfilled and you receive confirmation.
